## Integration

- Service:
- Market:
- Workflow: listing / inquiry / renter support / payment / document / maintenance / analytics

## Desired Outcome

What should become easier for the owner, renter, or implementer?

## Safety Boundary

- [ ] Dry-run mode exists before live writes
- [ ] Owner approval remains required for commitments
- [ ] Terms of service allow the integration path
- [ ] No scraping or auto-posting without explicit approval
- [ ] Private renter data stays in runtime storage

## Notes

Do not include credentials, webhook secrets, access tokens, real renter data, or private owner financials.
